review_context.evidence_location: Private local audit workspace; not included in the public preview
review_context.review_type: NAIO prepublication static source review; not third-party certification
review_context.superseded_when: Source archive digest, preview artifacts, or review scope changes
review_context.tooling_scope: Local archive, checksum, container/XML, inventory, and text-parity checks

statement: The source archive was audited as untrusted input. Static source integrity and declaration inventories were verified. No package instructions or runtime criteria were executed. The original source payload is intentionally omitted from the public preview because it contains installer-facing language unsupported by enforceable runtime evidence. These provenance statements are not independently reproducible from the public preview alone and do not constitute external certification.
